name: FERAX Capital AG
summary: FERAX Capital AG, previously known as Impera Total Return AG, is a private equity and venture capital firm specializing in investments in pre-IPO financing, mature privately-held IPO candidates, later stage listed companies, turnaround, and PIPE transactions. The firm seeks to invest in Germany, Austria and Switzerland. The firm seeks to make an average investment of √Ç¬Ä0.25 million ($0.28 million) with a maximum investment up to √Ç¬Ä1 million ($1.12 million). FERAX Capital AG was founded on March 18, 1998 and is based in Frankfurt am Main, Germany. The firm was formerly a subsidiary of Mountain Super Angel AG.
